title: The Combat Book
description: The Combat Book is a melee and ranged hybrid weapon with super-fast attack speed but has low damage.
body:
### The Combat Book
### 
The Combat Book is a melee and ranged hybrid weapon with super fast attack speed but has low damage. The weapon can crafted with a stick, a book, 2 iron bars, 2 iron nuggets, and 1 gunpowder. Right click for Ranged Attack.

![How to craft Combat Book:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45495063d03df2aba9164facfcf2539d08d4c3cc.png)

### Weapon Stats:
### 
Efficiency: 0

Enchantibiity: 2

Attack Damage: 3 (1.5 Hearts)

Attack Speed: 2.25

Ranged Attack Cooldown: 50 Ticks (2.5 seconds)

Durability: 240

Melee Attack: -1 Durability

Ranged: -1.5 Durability

Repair Items: Paper, Leather, Iron Nugget, and Iron Bars
